creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text: After ports 88b0ae2bb9c6 main branch (/latest repo) is no longer affected. 2022Q3 branch (current /quarterly repo) is still afected, and 2022Q4 (future /quarterly repo) won't branch from main until 2022-10-01. One could wait 2 months for both CVEs to evaporate but /quarterly is default on -RELEASEs and was created for security backports in the first place.
